category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Kuwait market under KUCAS / MEW.

title.en: China-to-Kuwait LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入科威特：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入科威特：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Kuwait market-access requirements: the mandatory KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme) run by PAI (Public Authority for Industry), GSO lighting standards (GSO IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471), the GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label, MEW grid requirements (240 V, 50 Hz), and CITRA radio approval for smart luminaires, versus Chinese GB standards (GB 30255, GB 7000) and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与科威特市场准入要求差距对照：由公共工业局（PAI）运行的强制性 KUCAS（科威特符合性保证计划）、GSO 照明标准（GSO IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、GSO/科威特能效标签、MEW 电网要求（240 V，50 Hz），以及智能灯具的 CITRA 无线电核准，与中国 GB 标准（GB 30255、GB 7000）及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與科威特市場准入要求差距對照：由公共工業局（PAI）運行的強制性 KUCAS（科威特符合性保證計劃）、GSO 照明標準（GSO IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、GSO/科威特能效標籤、MEW 電網要求（240 V，50 Hz），以及智能燈具的 CITRA 無線電核准，與中國 GB 標準（GB 30255、GB 7000）及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Kuwait law, PAI/KUCAS technical regulations, GSO standards, GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, and CITRA radio requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行科威特法律、PAI/KUCAS 技术法规、GSO 标准、GSO/科威特能效标签阈值及 CITRA 无线电要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行科威特法律、PAI/KUCAS 技術法規、GSO 標準、GSO/科威特能效標籤閾值及 CITRA 無線電要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Kuwait must obtain a KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme) conformity certificate administered by PAI (Public Authority for Industry) — typically a Technical Evaluation Report plus a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity issued before goods clear Shuwaikh or Shuaiba port; demonstrate electrical safety to GSO IEC 60598-1 (luminaires) and the relevant GSO IEC component standards, rated for the Kuwait grid of 240 V, 50 Hz; meet GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency requirements and affix the GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label where applicable; document photobiological safety per GSO IEC 62471; appoint an in-country Kuwaiti importer / registered agent as the legal entry party; and, for smart/wireless luminaires, obtain CITRA (Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority) radio type approval. China RoHS (GB/T 26572) is not mirrored by any horizontal Kuwait RoHS, so there is no Kuwait RoHS step — but it also gives no Kuwait credit. CCC certification and Chinese GB test reports do not by themselves satisfy KUCAS.
answer_first.zh: 向科威特出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：取得由公共工业局（PAI）管理的 KUCAS（科威特符合性保证计划）符合性证书——通常为技术评估报告加上在货物通关舒韦赫（Shuwaikh）或舒艾巴（Shuaiba）港口前签发的逐批符合性证书；按 GSO IEC 60598-1（灯具）及相关 GSO IEC 组件标准证明电气安全，并按科威特电网 240 V、50 Hz 定额；满足 GSO/科威特能效要求并在适用情况下加贴 GSO/科威特能效标签；按 GSO IEC 62471 记录光生物安全；指定科威特本地进口商/注册代理作为合法准入主体；对于智能/无线灯具，取得 CITRA（通信与信息技术监管局）无线电型号核准。中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572）在科威特无任何横向 RoHS 对应，因此无科威特 RoHS 步骤——但也不能据此获得科威特准入豁免。CCC 认证及中国 GB 检测报告本身不满足 KUCAS。
answer_first.zht: 向科威特出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：取得由公共工業局（PAI）管理的 KUCAS（科威特符合性保證計劃）符合性證書——通常為技術評估報告加上在貨物通關舒韋赫（Shuwaikh）或舒艾巴（Shuaiba）港口前簽發的逐批符合性證書；按 GSO IEC 60598-1（燈具）及相關 GSO IEC 組件標準證明電氣安全，並按科威特電網 240 V、50 Hz 定額；滿足 GSO/科威特能效要求並在適用情況下加貼 GSO/科威特能效標籤；按 GSO IEC 62471 記錄光生物安全；指定科威特本地進口商/註冊代理作為合法准入主體；對於智能/無線燈具，取得 CITRA（通信與信息技術監管局）無線電型號核准。中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572）在科威特無任何橫向 RoHS 對應，因此無科威特 RoHS 步驟——但也不能據此獲得科威特准入豁免。CCC 認證及中國 GB 檢測報告本身不滿足 KUCAS。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Per release; KUCAS technical regulations, GSO standard editions, and GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency thresholds re-verified each cycle.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. PAI/KUCAS scope and GSO standard references must be re-verified against current PAI and GSO publications on each review cycle.
